publishedAbstract: This solution is a continuation to [KCS #7050249 Migrating ODF from vanilla OVNKubernetes to dedicated secondary networks using Multus](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7050249). While testing didn't result in major failures that might require a full roll-back for an ODF cluster. However, for the completeness of the solution we needed to provide a way to our customers to revert configuration to OVNKubernetes shall a necessity arises.
publishedTitle: Revert ODF cluster networking from dedicated secondary networks with Multus to OVNKubernetes - Dev preview
